items.visual_description: A structured, corset-style bustier top made from dark wash indigo denim. It features a sweetheart neckline, wide shoulder straps, and prominent contrast stitching in a tan or orange color that defines the seams and cups. The top has a scalloped, zigzag stitch detail along the neckline and hem.

overall_description: This is a product shot of a dark indigo denim bustier top. The top is designed with a structured, corset-like fit, featuring a sweetheart neckline and wide straps. The look is defined by the classic denim contrast stitching in tan, which accentuates the seams and paneling of the garment.
